sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I can see the blocks have moved to the left side of the horizontal bar, near the white cross. The orange and blue blocks are now on the left side. Let me check the exact position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block position
after = current_frame

print("=== Orange block ===")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\n=== Blue block ===")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check area
ascii_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Area (rows 20-40, cols 14-30) ===")
for r in range(20, 41):
    row_str = ""
    for c in range(14, 31):
        ch = ascii_lines[r][c]
        if ch == 'c': row_str += '.'
        elif ch == 'G': row_str += '#'
        elif ch == 'O': row_str += 'o'
        elif ch == 'b': row_str += 'b'
        elif ch == 'B': row_str += 'B'
        elif ch == 'W': row_str += '+'
        elif ch == 'w': row_str += ','
        else: row_str += ch
    print(f"{r:2d}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

The blocks are at the left end of the horizontal bar. The white cross is below and to the right. The left gray area is at rows 30-39, cols 14-23.
Now I need to move DOWN to enter the left gray area. From rows 25-29, DOWN should move the blocks into the left gray area.
Let me try DOWN 2 to move the blocks into the left gray area.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move DOWN into left gray area
action(['DOWN', 'DOWN'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
